q: what must a stadium control room contain?
note: Security control room contents. 24051 §10.1 / 2021 §44.1; 2026 renamed it Venue Operation Centre.

q: does a stadium need a doping control room?
note: 2026 §40.2: at least one fully equipped doping control room.

q: how many corner flag poles are required at a stadium?
note: 2026 §8.3: two sets per corner, eight poles total.

q: how many team dressing rooms must a stadium have?
note: 2026 §15.1: minimum of two team dressing rooms.

q: is a medical room required at the stadium?
note: 2026 §40.1: at least one fully equipped medical room.

q: do spectator areas need first aid facilities?
note: 2026 §54.1: first aid facilities in each spectator sector.

q: what are the requirements for goalposts and crossbars?
note: 2026 §8.1: goalposts per the Laws of the Game.

q: what illumination must stadium floodlights provide?
note: 2026 §9.1: floodlights with an illumination system maintaining a minimum average.

q: what must the stadium media centre accommodate?
note: 2026 §25.1: media centre sized per stadium category.

q: what are the requirements for a venue operation centre?
note: 2026 §51: Venue Operation Centre (the renamed control room). Exercises the synonym bridge.

q: what is the maximum ticket price a stadium may charge spectators?
note: The infrastructure regulations do not set ticket prices. Ask must abstain, not invent a rule.
